steps.observed: Returned 17 completed memos
200 OK with full memo detail
200 OK
File exists (9639 bytes)

steps.expected: Left pane (waveform) and right pane (transcript) with resizable divider
steps.observed: Found flex container with left pane (style='width: {leftPct}%'), divider (w-2 cursor-col-resize, role=separator), and right pane (flex-1)
handleDividerMouseDown function sets up mousemove/mouseup listeners, tracks delta to adjust leftPct
import WaveSurfer from 'wavesurfer.js' at line 1, WaveSurfer.create() with container, waveColor, progressColor, barWidth, etc.
Button with data-play-button attribute, onclick=togglePlay, shows play/pause icons based on isPlaying state
Span with font-mono showing {currentTimeDisplay} / {durationDisplay} using formatTime()
Select element with id='speed-select', options from SPEEDS array [0.5, 0.75, 1, 1.25, 1.5, 2], onchange calls handleSpeedChange which calls setPlaybackRate()

steps.action: Check wavesurfer.js default behavior for click-to-seek
steps.observed: wavesurfer.js v7.12.6 defaults interact:true. Renderer click handler calls this.seekTo(t) when options.interact is true. No explicit override in WaveformPane.svelte config.

assertions.title: Segment list with timestamps and speaker badges

steps.expected: Segment list rendering with SegmentItem components
steps.observed: TranscriptPane iterates segments with {#each}, renders SegmentItem with segment data, isCurrent flag, and onclick handler

steps.action: Check SegmentItem.svelte for timestamps and speaker badges
steps.expected: Timestamp display and speaker badge with color
steps.observed: Timestamp: span with font-mono text-xs showing formatTime(segment.start_ms). Speaker badge: colored circle (h-2 w-2 rounded-full) + speaker_key text

steps.action: Check how current segment is determined from playback position
steps.expected: Current segment index updated when currentTimeMs changes
steps.observed: _updateCurrentSegment() in editor.svelte.ts is called from setCurrentTimeMs(). It iterates segments to find one containing the current time, or the nearest upcoming one. SegmentItem receives isCurrent prop and applies border-accent bg-accent/5 styling.
TranscriptPane has $effect that scrolls to currentSegmentIndex using scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' })

steps.expected: Clicking a segment seeks audio to its start time
steps.observed: SegmentItem onclick calls handleRowClick -> handleSegmentClick(i) -> seekToSegment(index) which returns start_ms, then seekCallback(ms) which calls waveformPane.seekToTime(ms)

steps.action: Check keyboard handler for Space key
steps.observed: case ' ': e.preventDefault(); clicks [data-play-button] element. Guard checks target is not input/textarea/select (returns early if it is)

steps.expected: Left seeks back 5s, Right seeks forward 5s
steps.observed: case 'ArrowLeft': newTime = Math.max(0, currentTimeMs - 5000); case 'ArrowRight': newTime = Math.min(durationMs, currentTimeMs + 5000). Both call waveformPane.seekToTime(newTime)

steps.expected: Up moves to previous segment, Down moves to next
steps.observed: case 'ArrowUp': seeks to curIdx-1 segment. case 'ArrowDown': seeks to curIdx+1 segment. Both use _getCurrentIndex() to find current position and seekToSegment() to navigate.

steps.action: Check WaveformPane.svelte for speaker band rendering
steps.expected: Canvas element rendering speaker-colored segments over waveform
steps.observed: Canvas element (h-4 w-full) below waveform. drawSegmentBand() renders colored rectangles per segment using getSpeakerColor(), positioned proportionally to segment start_ms/end_ms relative to durationMs.

steps.expected: Click on text activates inline editing with textarea
steps.observed: When isEditing is true, renders <textarea> with bound value. Click on text (handleTextClick) sets editingSegmentId. Textarea has auto-resize, input handler, and blur handler.
updateSegmentText() sets _saveTimer = setTimeout(async () => { await _flushPendingSaves(); }, 1500). Timer is cleared and restarted on each keystroke. _flushPendingSaves() sends PATCH request.
GET /api/memos/757bd1ab.../segments -> 200, revision=1, 1 segment with id, ordinal, start_ms, end_ms, text, speaker_key, confidence, edited

steps.expected: Updates segment text, returns new revision
steps.observed: PATCH with base_revision=1 -> 200, revision=2, updated segment with text='the (edited)', edited=true

steps.action: Check backend segments service for revision increment
steps.observed: segments_service.patch_segments() computes new_revision = current_revision + 1, updates memos.transcript_revision in DB, returns new revision. Confirmed via API: revision went from 1 to 2 after PATCH.

steps.action: PATCH with stale base_revision (1, current is 2)
steps.observed: HTTP 409 with detail: 'Conflict: transcript has been modified', current_revision: 2, current_segments with latest data

steps.expected: Toolbar with back, title, export, copy, re-run buttons
steps.observed: Found toolbar div (shrink-0, border-b, bg-surface-800) with: back button (goBack), title (memo?.title), export button (SVG download icon), copy button (SVG clipboard icon), re-run transcription button (SVG refresh icon). Export/copy/re-run marked 'coming soon' in title.

steps.action: Check editor store for localStorage save of pane width
steps.expected: Pane width saved to localStorage and restored on load
steps.observed: loadPaneWidth() reads localStorage 'nanoscribe-editor-pane-width' (default 65). savePaneWidth() writes to localStorage. setLeftPaneWidthPct() calls savePaneWidth() with clamped value (30-70).
When isEditing && saving: shows 'Saving...' text. When showSaved is true (set after blur if segment.edited): shows 'Saved' text in accent color for 1500ms.

steps.action: Check for edited badge/icon on segments
steps.observed: When segment.edited && !isEditing: shows pencil/edit SVG icon (h-3 w-3, inline) with title='Edited'

steps.action: Check keyboard handler for Enter key
steps.expected: Enter focuses current segment's text editor
steps.observed: case 'Enter': e.preventDefault(); gets current segment index via getCurrentSegmentIndex(), sets editingSegmentId to that segment's id

steps.action: Check keyboard handler for Escape key
steps.observed: Two places: (1) In +page.svelte global handler: case 'Escape' blurs any active editor by clearing editingSegmentId and blurring focused textarea. (2) In SegmentItem.svelte: handleKeydown checks for Escape to blur the textarea directly.

assertions.title: Space doesn't trigger play when editing

steps.action: Check that Space handler checks for focused textarea
steps.expected: Space ignored when textarea/input is focused
steps.observed: Two layers of protection: (1) Global handler in +page.svelte checks e.target instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement and returns early. (2) SegmentItem.svelte handleKeydown calls e.stopPropagation() for Space key, preventing it from reaching the global handler.

steps.action: Check TranscriptPane for empty state handling
steps.expected: Shows 'No transcript yet' message when no segments
steps.observed: When !hasContent (segments.length === 0): shows document icon SVG, 'No transcript yet' text, and 'Segments will appear here after transcription completes.' subtext

summary: Tested 26 assertions: all 26 passed. Editor page renders correctly at /memos/{memoId} (SPA route returns 200). Two-pane layout with resizable divider implemented. Waveform uses wavesurfer.js v7.12.6 with full transport controls, speed selector (0.5x-2x), and click-to-seek (default interact:true). Speaker segment band rendered on canvas. Segment list shows timestamps, speaker badges, and edited indicators. Current segment highlights during playback with auto-scroll. Keyboard shortcuts all implemented: Space (play/pause, guarded when editing), Arrow keys (seek 5s), Up/Down (segment nav), Enter (focus editor), Escape (blur). Autosave debounces at 1.5s. PATCH /api/memos/{id}/segments works correctly with revision increment and 409 conflict on stale revision. Divider position persisted to localStorage. Empty state message shown when no segments.
